hyperedges.label: Onboarding Screen Flow
hyperedges.note: Sequential onboarding wizard; each screen navigates to the next via navigation.navigate(PATIENT_ROUTES.X); all screens share onboarding data via OnboardingContext

hyperedges.label: Booking Flow
hyperedges.note: Linear booking flow navigated via BookStack; therapist object passed as route param across all steps

hyperedges.label: Main Tab Screens
hyperedges.note: All root tab screens use TabScreenWrapper for entry animation and consume PatientContext

hyperedges.label: ChatFeatureComponents
hyperedges.note: All components that together compose the chat feature of MWP Patient

hyperedges.label: OnboardingUIComponents
hyperedges.note: All UI components that compose the onboarding flow screens

hyperedges.label: NavigationComponents
hyperedges.note: Components forming the custom bottom tab navigation system
